CanceledMembershipId.description: The unique ID of the canceled membership

MembershipId.description: The unique ID of the membership which is being canceled; should be used to find memberships which may be safely deleted.

TeamId.description: The unique ID of the team associated with this canceled membership

PlayerID.description: The player's unique PlayerID as assigned by SportsDataIO. Note: this ID stays with the player their entire career

Created.description: The date and time when this canceled membership was created
